Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
289 
WVR_1915B_MOS 
LABEL: 
1915(b) Waiver Months 
DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a Section 1915(b) waiver in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: WVR_1915B_MOS 
LONG NAME: WVR_1915B_MOS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
2 
FILE(S): 
Waiver 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 
VALUES: 
0–12 (Number of months) 
COMMENT: 
This variable
